generated.refresh_notes: 2026-06-10 count reconciliation for 1.4.0 release. All counts re-enumerated from ground-truth grep over the .distignore distribution scope (175 plugin-own PHP files, excluding vendor/, tests/, build/, src/, audit/, bin/, docs/, plan/, marketing/, libs/edd-sl-sdk). Counts updated: rest 43->41 (ground-truth register_rest_route() call sites; the 43 was an overcount from a transitional note — actual call sites are 41 across 12 files); shortcodes 11->2 (add_shortcode() call sites: 1 block-wrapper loop in core/class-plugin.php registering 18 unique shortcode tags + 1 widget in core/widgets/class-widget-shortcode.php; the old 11 was a unique-tag count not a call-site count); capabilities 12->13 (wcb_access_admin_jobs now included in the class-roles.php sync array but lacks a registered ability — counted in the full cap list; capabilities[] detail array in manifest.json still lists the 12 ability-backed caps and needs a separate full-refresh to add wcb_access_admin_jobs); hooks_fired 175->189 (ground-truth 48 do_action + 141 apply_filters call sites excluding comments/docblocks; previous 175 was an incomplete enumeration); hooks_unique 101->108 (40 unique do_action names + 68 unique apply_filters names); cron 3->4 (4 wp_schedule_event/wp_schedule_single_event call sites: jobs-expiry daily + jobs-expiry single-event re-arm + featured-expiry daily + deadline-reminders daily; previous 3 was missing the single-event re-arm). Stable: rest 41, ajax 0, admin_pages 9, blocks 17, tables 3, services 39, wp_cli 5. New 1.4.0 additions driving count changes: Report-a-Job (wcb_job_reported + wcb_job_flag_resolved do_action, POST /jobs/{id}/report + POST /jobs/{id}/resolve-flag routes already in moderation module — routes counted in 41); AI filter hooks added in core for Pro consumption (wcb_ai_ranking_available, wcb_ai_matching_available, wcb_ai_completion_available in apply_filters — these drove the hooks_fired increase). Detail arrays in manifest.json were NOT re-enumerated this pass; only counts were reconciled.
